panels.title: Status
panels.description: Liveness heuristic — count of log lines in the last 30 minutes. Prometheus scrapes OTLP push from botsito, so there is no up{job="botsito"} series; Loki activity is the best available signal.

panels.title: Query Outcomes / hour
panels.description: Agent SDK query outcomes per hour (success, error, timeout, background, rejected).

panels.title: Messages (24h)
panels.description: Total inbound messages processed in the last 24 hours.

panels.title: Success Rate (24h)
panels.description: Share of messages with outcome=success over the last 24 hours. Red <95%, yellow 95–99%, green >=99%.

panels.title: Messages / hour
panels.description: Inbound messages grouped by outcome, per hour.

panels.title: Errors (24h)
panels.description: Messages with outcome=error over the last 24 hours.

panels.title: Messages by Transport
panels.description: Inbound messages by transport platform (telegram, whatsapp, slack)

panels.title: Avg Query Duration (1h)
panels.description: Average SDK query duration over the last hour.

panels.title: Query Duration (p50 / p95)
panels.description: Agent SDK query latency percentiles over a 5-minute rate window.

panels.title: Slowest Queries (24h)
panels.description: Queries whose elapsedMs exceeded 30 s in the last 24 hours, sorted slowest-first.

panels.title: Cost / hour
panels.description: USD spent on Claude model calls in the last hour. Counter-reset safe via increase().

panels.title: Cache Hit Rate (1h)
panels.description: Share of input tokens served from prompt cache over the last hour. Red <30%, yellow 30–50%, green >=50% (issue #619 criteria).

panels.title: Fallback Engaged (24h)
panels.description: Queries where the SDK's native fallbackModel swapped to a second model mid-request (added in botsito #647).

panels.title: Cache Tokens (read vs creation vs uncached)
panels.description: Per-second token rates stacked: cache hits (cache_read), cache writes (cache_creation), and uncached input tokens.

panels.title: Tokens (input vs output)
panels.description: Agent token rates: input (all sources — uncached + cache_read + cache_creation) vs output, per 5-minute window.

panels.title: Hook Errors (1h)
panels.description: Count of SDK hooks that threw in the last hour.

panels.title: Extraction Failures (1h)
panels.description: Debounced memory-extraction failures in the last hour (per-channel Gemini extraction errors).

panels.title: Compaction Runs / hour
panels.description: Conversation compaction runs grouped by outcome.

panels.title: Hook Outcomes / hour
panels.description: SDK hook outcomes per hour: fired_ok, threw, dropped_malformed, dropped_subagent, skipped_unchanged.

panels.title: QMD Reindex Health
panels.description: QMD reindex lifecycle per hour: triggered / completed / skipped / failed.

panels.title: Recent Errors
panels.description: Botsito log lines at level>=error (Pino level 50), newest first.

targets.expr: {app="ca"} | json | __error__=`` | level >= 50 | line_format `❌ [{{ .module }}] {{ .msg }}{{ if .config }} [{{ .config }}]{{ end }}{{ if .channelId }}{{ if not .config }} channel={{ .channelId }}{{ end }}{{ end }}{{ if .elapsedMs }} took={{ .elapsedMs }}ms{{ end }}{{ if .outcome }} outcome={{ .outcome }}{{ end }}{{ if .model }} model={{ .model }}{{ end }}{{ if .cost }} cost=${{ .cost }}{{ end }}{{ if .agent }} agent={{ .agent }}{{ end }}{{ if .err_message }} err={{ .err_message }}{{ end }}{{ if .traceId }} trace={{ .traceId }}{{ end }}`

panels.title: Errors by Type
panels.description: Agent errors categorized by type (agent_stuck, overloaded, agent_timeout, agent_error, transport_error, unknown)

panels.title: Sub-agent Outcomes / hour
panels.description: Completed / failed / stopped runs per sub-agent, per hour. Stacked to expose cumulative traffic and failure share.

panels.title: Orphans Found (24h)
panels.description: Orphaned queries found at startup in the last 24 hours.

panels.title: Orphans Resumed (24h)
panels.description: Orphaned queries successfully resumed in the last 24 hours.

panels.title: Orphans Failed (24h)
panels.description: Orphaned queries that failed to resume in the last 24 hours.

panels.title: Resume Outcomes
panels.description: Resume outcomes over time: orphans resumed (by method: session vs text), failed, skipped, queue resumed, queue dropped.

panels.title: Brain-first compliance
panels.description: Tracks botsito.tool_use.invocations — verifies the brain-first rule fires (brian called before other tools on named-entity messages).

panels.title: Tool invocations / hour — by tool
panels.description: Volume of each tool called per hour. Brian should lead on named-entity queries; sustained absence of brian signals brain-first rule violations.

panels.title: Brian share of tool calls (24h)
panels.description: brian calls / total tool calls over last 24h. Should stay above ~20% on typical usage days; a drop toward 0 means the brain-first rule stopped firing.

panels.title: Brian calls (24h)
panels.description: Raw count of brian tool invocations in the last 24h.

panels.title: Tool invocations / hour — main vs sub-agents
panels.description: Distinguishes tool calls from the main agent (agent_name=main) vs sub-agents. Use to verify brian is called from main, not buried inside sub-agent turns.

panels.title: Streaming finalize
panels.description: Tracks ca.streaming.finalize — verifies the orphan-cursor fix (ca PR #1659 / issue #1657). outcome=orphaned is a stranded ▌ cursor (the bug; alerted via OrphanedStreamingCursor).

panels.title: Orphaned cursors (24h)
panels.description: THE BUG (ca #1657/#1659): stranded streaming cursors (▌) left visible after finalize. Must be 0 in steady state — red if >0.

panels.title: Retry exhausted (24h)
panels.description: Finalize edit failed all retries → fell back to delete+repost (degraded but recovered).

panels.title: Retry recovered (24h)
panels.description: Transient finalize-edit failure fixed by a retry (health blip; expected occasionally).

panels.title: Edit failures (24h)
panels.description: Individual failed finalize-edit attempts (rate of transient failures).

panels.title: Streaming finalize outcomes / hour
panels.description: ca.streaming.finalize counter broken down by outcome (finalized, deleted, orphaned, retry_recovered, retry_exhausted, edit_failed).

panels.title: Streaming finalize by transport / hour
panels.description: ca.streaming.finalize broken down by transport (slack, whatsapp) and outcome.
